replies.msg:
More and more businesses as well as individuals are choosing to communicate either professionally or socially using technology rather being face to face.
Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of using technology for communicating?

We are living in a society with technology,it has become a crucial part of our lives. Many businesses and individuals have opted to reach out to their customers or communicate with their friends using technology as opposed to in person. When vendors trade online, the benefits are effectiveness however, it may cause miscommunication. For individuals,it allows us to become more productive,but it also caused isolation.


Convenient is one of the benefits of doing business with technology. It allows people to go shopping online instead of physically traveling to a store. For example,Amazon is one of the biggest online distributors,its effective online services is one of the reasons why it became successful. However,doing business online does have its disadvantage. Miscommunication is one of the biggest problems. Customers are not able to see the actual products,so it may cause some misunderstanding. For instance,some people found out the size of their clothes are wrong after it arrived to their home.


In terms of individuals, productivity is one of the advantages of using technology for communication. By using technology ,people are able to chat with their friends or family wherever they are, especially when they are separate from different countries. An example to illustrate this efficiency is through various APPs such as Whatsapp or applications like Zoom. On the contrary, the drawbacks of individuals communicating by means of technology is isolation. Almost everyone owns a smartphone,so it is pretty common that children or even adults have an addiction on those social APPS or online games. For instance,some of them would even spend most of their day on online games,instead of talking to their family. This will definitely affect their mental health.


After discussing the benefits and drawbacks when businesses and individuals communicate by means of technology,for businessmen,they will be able to reach out to potential customers more efficiently with the trade-off of possible misunderstandings between clients. As for individuals,it also provides a more convenient way to communicate with each other.However,it may increase isolation issues. After all,technology certainly can improve our lives,but people should becareful when they are using it.
